common.tagline: German exam prep — Goethe, telc, ÖSD, TestDaF, ECL

landing.headline: German exam prep, focused.
landing.subhead: Practice Lesen, Hören, Schreiben, and Sprechen for Goethe, telc, ÖSD, TestDaF and ECL — with AI feedback aligned to the official rubrics.
landing.appBody: DeutschFit is a mobile app for learners preparing for German-language certification exams. The app is currently in closed beta on TestFlight (iOS) and Internal App Sharing (Android).
landing.footer: © 2026 DeutschFit. Operated by Jordan Moyo (Douala, Cameroon). DeutschFit and SmartlyDataSense are unregistered trade names.

account.title: Your account
account.loadingError: Couldn't load your account just now. Please refresh.
account.trialUsageEmpty: You haven't used any free-tier actions yet.

delete.heading: Danger zone
delete.subtitle: Permanently erase your account and all of your data.
delete.body1: This will permanently erase your DeutschFit account, your writing and speaking submissions, your exam attempts, your progress, and any saved drills.
delete.body2: Active subscriptions are billed on the website. If you have an active plan, cancel it before deleting your account.
delete.irreversible: This is permanent and cannot be undone.
delete.subsHint: An immutable audit record (your user ID, email, timestamp, and source) is retained for 12 months as evidence under GDPR Art. 30.
delete.errorInvalidConfirm: You must type DELETE exactly to confirm.
delete.errorFailed: Something went wrong on our side. Your account is still active. Please try again, and if it keeps failing, email support@deutschfit.app.

auth.title: Sign in to your account
auth.subtitle: We'll email you a magic sign-in link.
auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox for a sign-in link.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
